---
name: 💡 Feature Request (with subtasks)
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement with default subtasks
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, with-subtasks
type: feature
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Context
Explain the need or problem that this feature would solve.

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe the desired feature or suggested implementation.

## 🧩 Alternatives Considered
List any alternative approaches or solutions you’ve thought of.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Works as described  
- [ ] Compatible with other modules  
- [ ] Tested and documented  

## 🧰 Additional Information
Links, mockups, or references.
